message:
Implement async streaming decode with asupersync runtime

Add true async streaming support for TOON decoding when the async-stream
feature is enabled:

New module (async_decode.rs):
- AsyncDecodeStream struct: Yields JsonStreamEvent items from TOON lines
- Supports cancellation via asupersync's capability context
- Cooperative scheduling with yield points between line processing
- Stream-based API for processing large TOON inputs
- try_decode_stream_async(): Collect events into Vec asynchronously
- decode_stream_async(): Panics on error (for quick usage)

decode/mod.rs:
- Conditionally compile async_decode module when feature enabled
- Re-export async types when feature is available
- Dual implementation of try_decode_stream():
  - Without feature: Wraps sync decode in async fn
  - With feature: Uses true async streaming implementation

options.rs:
- Add Default derive to DecodeStreamOptions for easier construction

Cargo.lock:
- Updated for new asupersync dependency

This enables processing of large TOON files without blocking, with
proper cancellation support for long-running decode operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
